---
title: "CoNiche workflow"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{CoNiche workflow}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

This vignette will document the CoNiche workflows (CCA/GAM/Levins).
Use toy data examples to keep build times short for CRAN.
